name: Kitchen Candid Evening
description: Intimate candid apartment kitchen shot with rainy evening atmosphere and mixed lighting

subject.description: young woman early 20s mixed Mediterranean-Asian ethnicity, slim-curvy figure, dark blonde long messy waves

physical_details.body_type: slim-curvy with small defined waist, round full hips, smooth thick thighs

skin.texture: realistic natural glow from indoor lighting

face.expression: calm confident gaze with teasing softness

pose_action.position: standing sideways at counter, torso twisted toward camera
pose_action.camera_relation: third-person candid shot, slightly low and close, mid-thigh to head
pose_action.dynamic_elements: hips slightly pushed back, one knee bent, weight shifted, one hand on counter, other holding phone

environment.location: modern city apartment kitchen near large window

lighting.direction: soft cool daylight from window, warm kitchen lights

luma.motion_notes: Subtle body movement, rain running down window, soft light flickering

reve.prompt: Raw candid photography in the style of authentic lifestyle moments, young woman in kitchen during rainy evening, mixed Mediterranean-Asian beauty, grey tank top white shorts, modern apartment aesthetic, cinematic mixed lighting

grok-imagine.prompt: Candid kitchen moment, young woman dark blonde messy hair in grey tank and white shorts, modern apartment marble counter, rainy evening outside window, mixed warm cool lighting, iPhone photo vibes

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A candid photograph captures a young woman in her early 20s with mixed Mediterranean-Asian features standing in a modern city apartment kitchen during a rainy evening. She has a slim-curvy figure with a defined waist and round hips, dark blonde hair in long loose messy waves with strands falling naturally forward. Her expression is calm and confident with half-lidded eyes looking toward the camera and glossy lips. She wears a thin soft grey cropped tank top that fits tight with no bra underneath, and white low-rise lounge shorts tight around her hips and thighs. Standing sideways at the marble countertop with her torso twisted toward the camera, hips slightly pushed back, one knee bent, one hand on the counter and the other holding a phone. Through the large window, the rainy city is visible with soft reflections on surfaces. A coffee cup sits on the counter. The lighting mixes soft cool daylight from the window with warm kitchen lights, creating gentle highlights on her skin and realistic shadows. The shot feels spontaneous and intimate, captured from a third-person perspective slightly low and close, framing mid-thigh to head. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic natural skin texture.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman early 20s mixed Mediterranean-Asian features standing sideways in modern apartment kitchen, dark blonde long messy waves, slim-curvy figure, calm confident expression half-lidded eyes glossy lips, soft grey cropped tank top tight fit no bra, white low-rise lounge shorts, torso twisted toward camera hips pushed back knee bent, marble countertop coffee cup, rainy evening city visible through large window, mixed cool window daylight and warm kitchen lights, third-person candid shot mid-thigh to head, iPhone aesthetic handheld feel natural grain, not studio lighting or airbrushed
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A candid moment in a modern city apartment kitchen during a rainy evening. Young woman early 20s with mixed Mediterranean-Asian features stands sideways at marble counter, torso twisted toward camera. She has dark blonde long messy waves, slim-curvy figure with defined waist and round hips. Wearing a soft grey cropped tank top tight fit and white low-rise lounge shorts. Her expression is calm and confident with half-lidded eyes. One hand rests on counter, other holds phone. Through the large window, rainy city is visible. Mixed lighting of cool daylight from window and warm kitchen lights creates gentle highlights and realistic shadows. Coffee cup on counter. Shot has iPhone candid aesthetic with slight handheld feel.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the time of day to sunny afternoon while keeping the same kitchen setting, her pose at the counter, and outfit the same. Preserve her features and expression.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed ethnicity, body type, lighting sources all specified
3_technical_camera: 'iPhone 15 Pro Max', '26mm', specific distance and angle
4_negative_hygiene: excludes studio, centered, perfect composition aesthetics
5_spatial_consistency: precise pose with hip/knee positions, camera relation defined
6_lighting_storytelling: 'mixed cool daylight warm kitchen' = intimate evening mood
7_candid_authenticity: imperfections list ensures spontaneous real-life feel
